content:
Hi,
I found a small Rustdoc typo in rust/kernel/drm/driver.rs: low-priviledge should be low-privilege. I searched the GitHub issues and the Rust-for-Linux/DRM mailing-list archives and found no posted fix. Would this be suitable for a first documentation-only patch? If so, I’d like to take it.
No need to ask for permission, just send a patch.
younes has marked this topic as resolved.
